subject: Writing
notes: OPTIONAL | 1 essay prompt | 40 minutes | Scored separately (2–12 scale) | Required by select colleges

sub_topics: Understanding the complexity of the given issue or prompt
Engaging critically with multiple perspectives on the topic
Developing a clear and defensible thesis
Analysing the implications and nuances of different viewpoints
Going beyond surface-level reasoning to explore deeper considerations
Providing relevant reasoning to support the thesis
Using concrete and specific examples to strengthen arguments
Addressing and refuting counterarguments
Extending and deepening the argument beyond obvious points
Using evidence effectively and logically
Writing a clear and compelling introduction
Organising ideas logically and cohesively throughout the essay
Using effective transitions between sentences and paragraphs
Maintaining focus and unity throughout the essay
Writing a purposeful and satisfying conclusion
Using precise and varied vocabulary
Maintaining consistent and appropriate tone and style
Applying correct grammar, usage, and punctuation
Structuring sentences with variety and clarity
Avoiding ambiguity and vague language
